Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd (UEN: 202312345A). Your expected start date is 1 December 2023. Your monthly salary will be SGD 9,000, payable at the end of each calendar month.

Please be advised this offer is contingent upon the completion of all project plan requirements, and we do not anticipate any changes in project status affecting this offer. This letter does not constitute a Share Purchase Agreement ("SPA"), but any future considerations may involve SPA review.

Kindly confirm your acceptance by signing below and returning a copy to us by 1 November 2023. For more details, you can refer to your personal profile at https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.

Sincerely,

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah

Quantum Dynamics Pte Ltd
